title: CBC Benchmark Dataset for Anemia Classification and Severity Assessment
description: A de-identified benchmark dataset containing complete blood count (CBC) and related clinical parameters collected from pregnant women for anemia classification and severity assessment. The repository includes raw and preprocessed tabular data, metadata reports, preprocessing code, and documentation to support reproducible machine learning and hematological research.

notes: The raw dataset contains missing values and has not undergone preprocessing or imputation. The preprocessed dataset was generated after feature selection, de-identification, missing-value standardization, and MICE-based imputation using ExtraTreesRegressor.
